name: Giant Rat
rulings: Unique means only one Giant Rat can be on the board at a time. You cannot play a second copy while one is already in play.
When Giant Rat dies, its death effect promotes any Rat you control into a new Giant Rat. The promoted Rat is replaced in-place on the board.
If no friendly Rats are on the board when Giant Rat dies, the promote effect fizzles and nothing happens.
The promoted Rat becomes a fresh Giant Rat at full stats (30🗡️/30🤍), regardless of the original Rat's stats or damage.
